line.style: fill: rgb(216, 216, 216); stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(147, 154, 163); stroke-width: 3px;
fill: rgb(216, 216, 216); stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(147, 154, 163); stroke-width: 3px;

circle.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 0px; fill: rgb(104, 31, 209); filter: blur(20px);
stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 0px; fill: rgb(104, 31, 209); filter: blur(20px);

rect.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 0px; fill: rgb(8, 8, 15); filter: blur(20px); clip-path: url("#clip-0");
